description: Triggers for overview of the Modern Product Operating Model and skill selection guidance

queries.query: Give me an overview of the Modern Product Operating Model
Which product skill should I use for my situation?
Explain how the 6 product skills connect and work together
I'm new to structured product management — where do I start?
What's the difference between product-strategy, product-discovery, and product-architecture?
I need a quick reference guide to know when to use each product skill
Map my current problem to the right product operating model component
How should I introduce the modern product operating model to my team?
What is the full product operating system and how do I implement it?
Show me all available product skills and when to use each
Build an Opportunity Solution Tree for our retention challenge
Create a 1-page product strategy canvas
Design a staged rollout plan for our feature
Help me coach a struggling PM on their development
Run a bet retrospective — scale, iterate, or kill?
Build the bet backlog for Q2 planning
Set up eval strategy for our AI-native product
Design the board communication materials for our CPO
Create an interview guide for customer discovery
Write a solution brief for the onboarding bet
